teaser: At a hundred-candle ghost-story night, a collector confesses to an old murder — then is found slain by dawn.
challenge_prompt: Determine: (1) why the murderer smashed the water vat behind the shop; (2) whether Ofuji reached the shop before or after the hyakumonogatari ended, and if after, why she nonetheless saw the tatami-room candlelight slowly fade out; (3) which persons could have needed to smash the vat, with the complete chain of logic; and (4) the identity of the murderer, proving why each of the other guests is not the killer. Reason from the differing knowledge each person possessed; ignore the Later Queen Problem.
